src/main/java/com/tickets/TicketsApplica.general_idea: Remove deprecated Springfox Swagger2 annotation to resolve compilation errors in newer Spring Boot versions.
src/main/java/com/tickets/TicketsApplica.why_exists: The class 'EnableSwagger2' from the springfox library is removed or incompatible with the target Spring Boot version, causing a compile error (cannot find symbol).

src/main/java/com/tickets/config/WebConf.general_idea: Replace deprecated allowedOrigins with allowedOriginPatterns to support credentials in Spring Boot 2.4+.
src/main/java/com/tickets/config/WebConf.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.4+ throws an IllegalArgumentException if allowCredentials is true and allowedOrigins contains '*' or multiple origins; allowedOriginPatterns is the required replacement.

src/main/java/com/tickets/controller/Aut.general_idea: Replace deprecated Swagger 2 annotations with OpenAPI 3 annotations for class-level tagging.
src/main/java/com/tickets/controller/Aut.why_exists: io.swagger.annotations.Api is removed in newer SpringDoc/Swagger versions; code fails to compile if the old dependency is dropped or if the new version enforces OpenAPI 3.

src/main/java/com/tickets/controller/Aut.general_idea: Replace deprecated Swagger 2 annotations with OpenAPI 3 annotations for method-level operation description.
src/main/java/com/tickets/controller/Aut.why_exists: io.swagger.annotations.ApiOperation is removed in newer SpringDoc/Swagger versions; code fails to compile if the old dependency is dropped or if the new version enforces OpenAPI 3.

src/main/java/com/tickets/controller/Buy.general_idea: Migrate Swagger annotations from v2 (io.swagger.annotations) to v3 (io.swagger.v3.oas.annotations) to support OpenAPI 3.0.
src/main/java/com/tickets/controller/Buy.why_exists: The io.swagger.annotations package is deprecated and often removed in newer SpringDoc/Swagger versions; using it causes compile errors or missing API documentation in J21 environments.

src/main/java/com/tickets/controller/Fac.general_idea: Remove imports of sun.net.www.protocol.http.HttpURLConnection which is an internal JDK API.
